title.zh: 特朗普宣布与伊朗达成双重停火协议
title.en: Trump Announces 'Double Sided Ceasefire' with Iran

title.zh: 巴林遭遇爆炸袭击，停火协议排除黎巴嫩
title.en: Bahrain Blast Despite Ceasefire, Deal Excludes Lebanon

title.zh: 美伊达成两周停火协议，以色列表示不包含对真主党战斗
title.en: US and Iran Agree to Two-Week Ceasefire, Israel Excludes Hezbollah Fighting

title.zh: 第六次停火延期谈判开启，伊朗西部军事冲突升级
title.en: Sixth Ceasefire Extension Talks Begin, Iranian Western Region Conflict Escalates

title.zh: 特朗普宣布两周停火协议，避免文明威胁实现
title.en: Trump Announces Two-Week Cease-Fire, Avoids Civilization Threat

title.zh: 特朗普威胁摧毁文明与伊朗扩大反制
title.en: Trump Threatens Civilization Destruction, Iran Escalates Countermeasures

title.zh: 特朗普再发'文明死亡威胁' 多国紧急应对联合国表决受阻
title.en: Trump Issues Another 'Civilization Death Threat' Multiple Countries Respond Urgently as UN Vote Blocked

title.zh: 特朗普'文明毁灭'威胁引爆国际谴责 伊朗导弹第7次袭击以色列
title.en: Trump's 'Civilization Destruction' Threat Sparks International Condemnation, Iran Fires 7th Missile Barrage at Israel

title.zh: 特朗普威胁摧毁伊朗能源设施 伊朗拒绝停火谈判陷入僵局
title.en: Trump threatens Iran energy destruction as Tehran rejects ceasefire talks deadlock

title.zh: 特朗普'文明死亡警告'升温，美以再度打击伊朗基础设施
title.en: Trump 'Civilization Death Warning' Escalates, US-Israel Strike Iranian Infrastructure Again

title.zh: Deadline前夜：以色列确认打击8座桥梁，特朗普遭两党抨击，伊朗关闭对美外交渠道，英国拒绝美军使用基地
title.en: Eve of Deadline: Israel Confirms Strikes on 8 Bridges, Trump Criticized by Both Parties, Iran Closes Diplomatic Channels with US, UK Refuses US Base Access

title.zh: 哈尔克岛遭多次打击，特朗普发出'文明消亡'威胁，伊朗誓言跨区域报复
title.en: Kharg Island Hit Multiple Times, Trump Issues 'Civilization Will Die' Threat, Iran Vows Cross-Regional Retaliation

title.zh: Deadline倒计时：空袭伊朗桥梁火车站，特朗普称'整个文明今晚将消亡'，美军再次打击哈尔克岛
title.en: Countdown to Deadline: Airstrikes Hit Iranian Bridges and Train Station, Trump Warns 'Whole Civilization Will Die Tonight', US Strikes Kharg Island Again

title.zh: 特朗普警告期限到临：以色列警告伊朗人停用火车，沙特关闭与巴林通道
title.en: Trump's Deadline Looms: Israel Warns Iranians to Avoid Trains, Saudi Closes Link to Bahrain

title.zh: Deadline到期前夕：伊朗拒绝临时停火，特朗普威胁4小时摧毁基础设施
title.en: Eve of Deadline: Iran Rejects Ceasefire, Trump Threatens to Destroy Infrastructure in 4 Hours
